import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
# Test all imports work
from providers.base import DataProvider, QuoteData, KeyStatistics, PriceBar, CompanyInfo, FinancialPeriod, FinancialStatements, SearchResult
from providers.exceptions import ProviderError, ProviderTimeout, ProviderConnectionError, RateLimitError, DataNotFoundError
from providers.registry import ProviderRegistry, provider_registry
from providers.yahoo_finance import YahooFinanceProvider
from services.market_data_service import MarketDataService
print\('All imports OK'\)

# Test provider registration
yf_provider = YahooFinanceProvider\(\)
provider_registry.register\('yahoo', yf_provider\)
assert provider_registry.has\('yahoo'\)
assert provider_registry.get\('yahoo'\).name == 'yahoo'
assert provider_registry.list_providers\(\) == ['yahoo']
print\('Provider registry OK'\)

# Test market hours detection
result = MarketDataService.is_market_open\(\)
print\(f'Market open: {result}'\)

# Test exception types
try:
    raise DataNotFoundError\('yahoo', 'ZZZZ', 'quote data'\)
except ProviderError as e:
    print\(f'Exception hierarchy OK: {e}'\)

print\('All static tests passed!'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/model-builder/AAPL/generate \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"model_type": "dcf"}' | py -3.12 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
d = data['data']

print\('=== AAPL ASSUMPTION SET ==='\)
print\(f'Quality: {d[\\"data_quality_score\\"]}, Years: {d[\\"years_of_data\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Regime: {d[\\"metadata\\"][\\"regime\\"]}, Uncertainty: {d[\\"metadata\\"][\\"uncertainty_score\\"]}'\)
print\(\)

print\('--- BASE SCENARIO ---'\)
b = d['scenarios']['base']
print\(f'Revenue Growth: {b[\\"revenue_growth_rates\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Terminal Growth: {b[\\"terminal_growth_rate\\"]}'\)
print\(f'WACC: {b[\\"wacc\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Operating Margins: {b[\\"operating_margins\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Tax Rate: {b[\\"tax_rate\\"]}'\)
print\(f'CapEx/Rev: {b[\\"capex_to_revenue\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Weight: {b[\\"scenario_weight\\"]}'\)
print\(\)

print\('--- BULL SCENARIO ---'\)
bu = d['scenarios']['bull']
print\(f'Revenue Growth: {bu[\\"revenue_growth_rates\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Weight: {bu[\\"scenario_weight\\"]}'\)
print\(\)

print\('--- BEAR SCENARIO ---'\)
be = d['scenarios']['bear']
print\(f'Revenue Growth: {be[\\"revenue_growth_rates\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Weight: {be[\\"scenario_weight\\"]}'\)
print\(\)

print\('--- DCF ASSUMPTIONS ---'\)
dcf = d['model_assumptions']['dcf']
print\(f'Base Revenue: {dcf[\\"base_revenue\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Shares Outstanding: {dcf[\\"shares_outstanding\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Net Debt: {dcf[\\"net_debt\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Terminal Exit Multiple: {dcf[\\"terminal_exit_multiple\\"]}'\)
print\(f'CapEx/Rev: {dcf[\\"capex_to_revenue\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Depreciation/Rev: {dcf[\\"depreciation_to_revenue\\"]}'\)
print\(\)

print\('--- DDM ASSUMPTIONS ---'\)
ddm = d['model_assumptions']['ddm']
if ddm:
    print\(f'DPS: {ddm[\\"current_annual_dividend_per_share\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Near-term Growth: {ddm[\\"dividend_growth_rate_near_term\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Terminal Growth: {ddm[\\"dividend_growth_rate_terminal\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Model Type: {ddm[\\"model_type\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Cost of Equity: {ddm[\\"cost_of_equity\\"]}'\)
else:
    print\('None \(not a dividend payer\)'\)
print\(\)

print\('--- COMPS ---'\)
comps = d['model_assumptions']['comps']
print\(f'Multiples: {comps[\\"applicable_multiples\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Premium/Discount: {comps[\\"premium_discount\\"]}'\)
print\(\)

print\('--- CONFIDENCE ---'\)
conf = d['confidence']
print\(f'Overall: {conf[\\"overall_score\\"]}/100'\)
for det in conf['details']:
    print\(f'  {det[\\"category\\"]}: {det[\\"score\\"]} — {det[\\"reasoning\\"]}'\)
print\(\)

print\('--- WARNINGS ---'\)
print\(d['metadata']['warnings']\)
print\('--- DATA GAPS ---'\)
print\(d['metadata']['data_gaps']\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/c/Claude Access Point/StockValuation/Finance App/backend" && py -3.12 -c "
import asyncio
from db.connection import db
from repositories.market_data_repo import MarketDataRepo

async def check\(\):
    await db.connect\(\)
    repo = MarketDataRepo\(db\)
    fins = await repo.get_financials\('AAPL'\)
    if fins:
        latest = fins[0]
        print\('Latest fiscal year:', latest.get\('fiscal_year'\)\)
        for k in ['revenue', 'net_income', 'tax_expense', 'interest_expense',
                   'capex', 'capital_expenditure', 'free_cash_flow',
                   'total_debt', 'cash_and_equivalents', 'dividends_paid',
                   'shares_outstanding', 'ebit', 'ebitda', 'gross_profit',
                   'stockholders_equity']:
            print\(f'  {k}: {latest.get\(k\)}'\)
    await db.close\(\)

asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if d['success']:
    data = d['data']
    print\(f'PLTR: Quality={data[\\"data_quality_score\\"]}, Years={data[\\"years_of_data\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Regime: {data[\\"metadata\\"][\\"regime\\"]}'\)
    if data['scenarios']:
        print\(f'Growth: {data[\\"scenarios\\"][\\"base\\"][\\"revenue_growth_rates\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'WACC: {data[\\"scenarios\\"][\\"base\\"][\\"wacc\\"]}'\)
else:
    print\(f'Error: {d[\\"error\\"]}'\)
    # Check if it's insufficient data
    data = d.get\('data', {}\)
    print\(f'Warnings: {data.get\(\\"metadata\\", {}\).get\(\\"warnings\\", []\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

from engines.models import DCFResult, DDMResult, CompsResult, RevBasedResult
from engines.engine_utils import discount_factor, equity_bridge, extend_to_10_years, upside_downside

# Quick test: discount_factor

# Quick test: equity_bridge

print\(f'Equity bridge \(EV=1000, net_debt=200\): {eq}'\)

# Quick test: extend_to_10_years
rates = [0.15, 0.13, 0.11, 0.09, 0.07]
extended = extend_to_10_years\(rates, 0.025\)
print\(f'Extended growth rates: {[round\(r,4\) for r in extended]}'\)

# Quick test: upside_downside

print\(f'Upside \(150 vs 100\): {ud:.4f}'\)

Bash(cd "/c/Claude Access Point/StockValuation/Finance App/backend" && py -3.12 -c "
import json, urllib.request, urllib.error

req = urllib.request.Request\(
    'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/model-builder/AAPL/run/dcf',
    data=json.dumps\({}\).encode\(\),
    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    method='POST',
\)
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=60\) as resp:
        print\(resp.read\(\).decode\(\)[:3000]\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\(f'Status: {e.code}'\)
    body = e.read\(\).decode\(\)
    print\(f'Body: {body[:3000]}'\)
" 2>&1)
